folio.label: 189v

note.notetxt: 70 The first 69 lines are missing from the MS. RJ

folio.l: What eyletú yow to grone in this manere

note.notetxt: 70written in brown. Relevance with the rest of the text? Double check.ODR

folio.l: ñe ben a verrey slepere , fy for shame
And he answerde , and seide thus Madame
I preye yow , that ©e take it nat a grief
By god me mette , I was in swicú meschief
Rigút now , æ ©et myn herte is sore a frigút
Now god q¶ he , my sweuene recche a rigút
And kepe my body , out of foule prisoun
¢ Me mette how that I romed , vp and doun
W Inne oure ©erd , where as I saugú a beest
Was lyke an hound & wolde han mad a reest
Vp on my body and an had me deed
His colour was bitwexe , ©elew and reed
And tipped was his tail , & bothe hise Erys
Witú blak , vnlike the remenau~t of hise heris
His snoute was smal , w glowyngö eyen tweye
ñet for his look , for fere al moost I deye
This caused me , my gronyngö doutelees
¢ A voy q¶ she , fy oon ©ow hertelees
Allas quod she , for by æ god a boue
Now han ©e loost myn herte , & al my loue
I can nougút loue a Coward , by my feitú
For certes , what so any wo~man seitú
We alle desyren , if it mygút be
To han an housbonde , hardy wys & free
And secree, & no nygard , ne no fool
Ne hi~ æ is a gast , of euäy tool
Ne noon auentour , by æat god a boue
How dursten ©e for shame , seye to ©oure loue
That any thyngö , mygút make ©ow a ferd
Han ©e no ma~nes herte , and han a berd
Allas , and konne ©e ben a gast of sweuenys
No thyngö god wot , but vanytee in sweuene is
Sweuenes ben engendred , of replexiouns
And ofte of fume , and of complexiouns
Whan humours ben to habundau~t , in a wygút
Certes this drem , whicú ©e han met to nygút
Cometú of the gret , su¹fluytee
Of ©oure rede Colera , parde
Whicú causetú folk , to dredyn in here dreemes
Of arwes and of fyr , witú rede lemes
Of rede beestes , that they wol hem byte
